        + u*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(42*u^53 - 26*u^52 - 288*u^51 + 289*u^50 + 285*u^49 + 737*u^48 - 426*u^47 - 9885*u^46 + 9093*u^45 + 10038*u^44 - 3726*u^43 + 10333*u^42 - 134986*u^41 + 92566*u^40 + 163497*u^39 - 171120*u^38 + 242628*u^37 - 868785*u^36 + 244113*u^35 + 1434735*u^34 - 1535483*u^33 + 1358765*u^32 - 1866746*u^31 - 1212662*u^30 + 5591803*u^29 - 5060354*u^28 + 994277*u^27 + 3465321*u^26 - 6209698*u^25 + 4327300*u^24 + 1207384*u^23 - 4443409*u^22 + 2572080*u^21 + 1106309*u^20 - 2005453*u^19 + 326443*u^18 + 892343*u^17 - 612771*u^16 - 25970*u^15 + 244506*u^14 - 167987*u^13 + 1886*u^12 + 59340*u^11 - 10531*u^10 - 19824*u^9 + 15810*u^8 - 5121*u^7 - 1676*u^6 + 579*u^5 + 976*u^4 - 320*u^3 + 80*u^2 - 81*u + 12)*v^13

        + u^5*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(u^43 - 7*u^42 + 9*u^41 + 4*u^40 - 15*u^39 + 142*u^38 - 479*u^37 + 320*u^36 + 1042*u^35 - 1568*u^34 + 2595*u^33 - 6894*u^32 + 2491*u^31 + 20563*u^30 - 28949*u^29 + 14355*u^28 - 15755*u^27 - 15743*u^26 + 115768*u^25 - 147093*u^24 + 5547*u^23 + 132057*u^22 - 172269*u^21 + 121671*u^20 + 27313*u^19 - 136317*u^18 + 56898*u^17 + 40916*u^16 - 29410*u^15 - 5592*u^14 + 14190*u^13 - 8310*u^12 - 1557*u^11 + 3265*u^10 - 736*u^9 + 91*u^8 + 432*u^7 - 122*u^6 - 249*u^5 + 74*u^4 + 10*u^3 + u - 1)*v^8

        + u^9*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(u^33 - 7*u^32 + 31*u^31 - 40*u^30 - 62*u^29 + 156*u^28 - 282*u^27 + 818*u^26 - 903*u^25 - 1807*u^24 + 4415*u^23 - 2931*u^22 + 3206*u^21 - 3260*u^20 - 12315*u^19 + 31572*u^18 - 6326*u^17 - 23803*u^16 + 17667*u^15- 4094*u^14 - 1803*u^13 + 5220*u^12 - 229*u^11 - 2889*u^10 + 1072*u^9 + 375*u^8 - 706*u^7 + 77*u^6 + 77*u^5 + 42*u^4 + 3*u^3 + 9*u^2 - 13*u + 1)*v^6

        + u^13*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(2*u^23 - 6*u^22 + 16*u^21 - 34*u^20 + 57*u^19 + 117*u^18 - 314*u^17 + 236*u^16 - 239*u^15 + 588*u^14 + 776*u^13 - 2901*u^12 + 176*u^11 + 1569*u^10 - 223*u^9 - 131*u^8 - 89*u^7 - 29*u^6 - 37*u^5 + 75*u^4 - 26*u^3- 2*u^2 + u + 1)*v^4
        - u^16*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(u^17 - 3*u^16 + 19*u^15 - 37*u^14 - 2*u^13 + 39*u^12 - 52*u^11 + 135*u^10 - 449*u^9 - 87*u^8 + 448*u^7 + 2*u^6 - 80*u^5 - 49*u^4 + 7*u^3 - 10*u^2 + 13*u - 2)*v^3
        - u^17*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(5*u^12 - 9*u^11 + 13*u^10 - 5*u^9 + 32*u^8 + 18*u^7 - 90*u^6 - 8*u^5 + 15*u^4 + 11*u^3 - u^2 + u - 1)*v^2
        + u^20*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1)*(u^6 + u^4 - 13*u^3 - u^2 + u + 1)*v
        + u^23*(u^4 - 3*u^3 + 4*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*(u^4 + 2*u^3 + 4*u^2 + 3*u + 1);
x:=v;

9328*u^7*x^29+34984*u^7*x^28-95240*u^7*x^27+229112*u^7*x^26-520432*u^7*x^25+1075224*u^7*x^24-1907920*u^7*x^23+2789752*u^7*x^22-3254344*u^7*x^21+2926704*u^7*x^20-1927408*u^7*x^19+820640*u^7*x^18-102480*u^7*x^17-149872*u^7*x^16+145304*u^7*x^15-82696*u^7*x^14+37800*u^7*x^13-14760*u^7*x^12+4728*u^7*x^11-1272*u^7*x^10+328*u^7*x^9-72*u^7*x^8+8*u^7*x^7+21*u^6*x^32-315*u^6*x^31+1974*u^6*x^30-6769*u^6*x^29+14070*u^6*x^28-19117*u^6*x^27+19950*u^6*x^26-19474*u^6*x^25+8953*u^6*x^24+26285*u^6*x^23-54495*u^6*x^22-8519*u^6*x^21+195097*u^6*x^20-404194*u^6*x^19+486262*u^6*x^18-398874*u^6*x^17+232155*u^6*x^16-95144*u^6*x^15+25865*u^6*x^14-3934*u^6*x^13+385*u^6*x^12-371*u^6*x^11+252*u^6*x^10-70*u^6*x^9+7*u^6*x^8+12*u^5*x^31-228*u^5*x^30+1692*u^5*x^29-6738*u^5*x^28+16590*u^5*x^27-28146*u^5*x^26+38490*u^5*x^25-52560*u^5*x^24+78042*u^5*x^23-117660*u^5*x^22+173328*u^5*x^21-237432*u^5*x^20+273192*u^5*x^19-239370*u^5*x^18+145722*u^5*x^17-51036*u^5*x^16+378*u^5*x^15+9384*u^5*x^14-4284*u^5*x^13+438*u^5*x^12+282*u^5*x^11-108*u^5*x^10+12*u^5*x^9-10*u^4*x^30+95*u^4*x^29-420*u^4*x^28+1600*u^4*x^27-6470*u^4*x^26+21720*u^4*x^25-52675*u^4*x^24+92015*u^4*x^23-119025*u^4*x^22+116695*u^4*x^21-87775*u^4*x^20+51535*u^4*x^19-26035*u^4*x^18+14555*u^4*x^17-9120*u^4*x^16+3580*u^4*x^15+1305*u^4*x^14-3165*u^4*x^13+2445*u^4*x^12-1130*u^4*x^11+335*u^4*x^10-60*u^4*x^9+5*u^4*x^8-4*u^3*x^30+36*u^3*x^29-88*u^3*x^28-284*u^3*x^27+2976*u^3*x^26-12500*u^3*x^25+34940*u^3*x^24-71516*u^3*x^23+110500*u^3*x^22-130660*u^3*x^21+119344*u^3*x^20-85084*u^3*x^19+48180*u^3*x^18-22168*u^3*x^17+7968*u^3*x^16-1212*u^3*x^15-1316*u^3*x^14+1464*u^3*x^13-788*u^3*x^12+256*u^3*x^11-48*u^3*x^10+4*u^3*x^9-9*u^2*x^29+105*u^2*x^28-510*u^2*x^27+1296*u^2*x^26-1434*u^2*x^25-1734*u^2*x^24+10668*u^2*x^23-23889*u^2*x^22+34659*u^2*x^21-35754*u^2*x^20+26499*u^2*x^19-13479*u^2*x^18+3873*u^2*x^17+165*u^2*x^16-717*u^2*x^15+324*u^2*x^14-69*u^2*x^13+6*u^2*x^12-6*u*x^28+72*u*x^27-368*u*x^26+1058*u*x^25-1862*u*x^24+1964*u*x^23-954*u*x^22-256*u*x^21+226*u*x^20+1248*u*x^19-2836*u*x^18+3236*u*x^17-2438*u*x^16+1306*u*x^15-506*u*x^14+138*u*x^13-24*u*x^12+2*u*x^11-x^27+12*x^26-60*x^25+166*x^24-281*x^23+309*x^22-268*x^21+321*x^20-531*x^19+718*x^18-684*x^17+456*x^16-211*x^15+65*x^14-12*x^13+x^12)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
